understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked '+' so that every goal tile is occupied simultaneously, producing a WIN state and ultimately finishing the full set of levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each action moved the currently selected piece in a cardinal direction on a grid where coordinates are pixel-based (3 pixels per cell). Movement could be blocked by walls or adjacent objects; some adjacent objects could potentially be pushed if they were pushable, while walls generally prevented movement. Levels could include multiple selectable pieces; using CLICK on a selectable's exact pixel position switched control to that piece. The movement.*_blocked flags were only hints about adjacency and did not guarantee a move would fail.
